market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Exclusive Modern Villa – 7 BR for 4 Guests
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to a modern, fully‑private 7‑bedroom retreat where every bedroom boasts its own ensuite bathroom. This entire‑home offering is perfect for groups of up to four guests seeking a high‑end stay in a prime location. With a stellar 4.85 rating from 269 reviews, our property consistently delivers a five‑star experience. Each of the seven stylishly designed bedrooms provides plush bedding, premium linens, and a private bathroom, ensuring maximum comfort and privacy for every guest. The open‑plan living area features contemporary décor, a fully equipped kitchen, and large windows that flood the space with natural light. While the home does not currently list specific amenities, you’ll find all the essentials for a seamless stay. At £653.20 per night, this luxury home commands a rate that is 323% above the city’s median nightly price of £154.60. Over the next 90 days the calendar shows a 29.3% booking rate, leaving ample opportunity to attract more guests. Whether you’re planning a family getaway, a small corporate retreat, or a special celebration, this upscale retreat offers the space, style, and privacy you deserve. Book now to experience modern comfort combined with exclusive amenities in a tranquil setting.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a striking exterior/front‑façade or the main living area as the cover photo to showcase the property’s scale and modern design, capturing immediate visual interest.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate of £653.20 is 323% higher than the city median (£154.60) while the 90‑day occupancy is only 29.3% (vs. cohort median 47.8%) – consider price adjustments or limited‑time discounts to boost bookings.
The listing advertises 7 bedrooms but only accommodates 4 guests, which confuses travelers; clarify capacity or adjust the bedroom count to align with guest limits.

The description is currently missing and no amenities are listed; add a compelling 200‑300 word description and highlight high‑value amenities (outdoor space, parking, entertainment) to improve appeal.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing commands £653/night—over 300% above the city median—yet it’s only 29% booked in the next 90 days.
